inputs.label: Basic Dynamic Load Rating (C)
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer's rated load for 1 million revolutions, from bearing catalog.

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturer's rated load for 1 million revolutions, from bearing catalog.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rulman kataloğundan 1 milyon devir için üretici tarafından belirtilen yük değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Hersteller angegebene Belastung für 1 Million Umdrehungen, aus dem Lagerkatalog.

inputs.label: Equivalent Dynamic Load (P)
inputs.businessContext: Calculated equivalent radial load considering actual radial and axial forces.

businessContext_i18n.en: Calculated equivalent radial load considering actual radial and axial forces.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek radyal ve eksenel kuvvetler dikkate alınarak hesaplanan eşdeğer radyal yük.
businessContext_i18n.de: Berechnete äquivalente radiale Belastung unter Berücksichtigung tatsächlicher Radial- und Axialkräfte.

inputs.label: Rotational Speed (n)
inputs.businessContext: Shaft speed in revolutions per minute.

businessContext_i18n.en: Shaft speed in revolutions per minute.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakikadaki devir sayısı cinsinden mil hızı.

inputs.label: Bearing Life Exponent (p)
inputs.businessContext: 3 for ball bearings, 10/3 (≈3.33) for roller bearings as per ISO 281.

businessContext_i18n.en: 3 for ball bearings, 10/3 (≈3.33) for roller bearings as per ISO 281.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bilyalı rulmanlar için 3, makaralı rulmanlar için 10/3 (≈3.33) (ISO 281).
businessContext_i18n.de: 3 für Kugellager, 10/3 (≈3,33) für Rollenlager gemäß ISO 281.

inputs.label: Reliability Factor (a1)
inputs.businessContext: Life adjustment factor for reliability: 1 for 90%, 0.62 for 95%, 0.53 for 96%, etc. (ISO 281).

businessContext_i18n.en: Life adjustment factor for reliability: 1 for 90%, 0.62 for 95%, 0.53 for 96%, etc. (ISO 281).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güvenilirlik için ömür ayar faktörü: %90 için 1, %95 için 0.62, %96 için 0.53, vb. (ISO 281).
businessContext_i18n.de: Lebensdaueranpassungsfaktor für Zuverlässigkeit: 1 für 90 %, 0,62 für 95 %, 0,53 für 96 % usw. (ISO 281).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
